notes: Iteration #69 (Campaign 2026-07-09). New entry: volume-profile breakout of a HIGH-VOLUME NODE (HVN).
HVN is identified as a bin whose volume exceeds (hvn_z_threshold * mean) within the rolling 1m profile.
When price breaks above/below an HVN with volume confirmation, take a position in the direction of the break.
Exit combines ATR trailing + profit-lock (ratchet from peak once profit exceeds profit_lock_atr).
BTCUSDT-only for clean execution study on the most liquid pair.
